steps.title: Find the slope from the table
steps.content: Use two rows, $(1,5)$ and $(3,13)$. The slope is $$m=\frac{13-5}{3-1}=4.$$ Substitute $(1,5)$ into $f(x)=4x+b$: $$5=4+b,$$ so $b=1$.

steps.title: Write and check the function
steps.content: The function is $$f(x)=4x+1.$$ It checks all three rows: $4(1)+1=5$, $4(3)+1=13$, and $4(5)+1=21$. That matches Choice C — $f(x) = 4x + 1$.
